description: GitHub Actions update policy. Third-party actions are pinned to digests (via config:best-practices) for supply-chain safety, but first-party commercetools actions and reusable workflows are exempt: they intentionally track a floating major tag (e.g. @v2) so tag moves propagate to consumers.

packageRules.description: Do not pin internal commercetools Actions/reusable workflows to digests; trust the floating major tag.
